Patch Set 5:

The commit message said "Instead of register the commit callback in top_trans_start()...". That makes me to think that we resister the callback some late, and we should do that during top_trans_create() or similar earlier point.

But we still register the callback in the top_trans_start() => prepare_multiple_node_trans() => distribute_txn_assign_batchid().

Any mis-understand?

Patch Set 5:

Build Started https://build.hpdd.intel.com/job/lustre-reviews/35745/

Patch Set 5: Verified+1

Build Successful 
 
https://build.hpdd.intel.com/job/lustre-reviews/35745/ : SUCCESS

Patch Set 5:

"But we still register the callback in the top_trans_start() => prepare_multiple_node_trans() => distribute_txn_assign_batchid()."

Yes, only register the commit once it put it to the commit track list (tdtd_list), in original implementation, we might add it the list, but not register the callback. Not sure if this answers your question?

Patch Set 5: Code-Review+1

> "But we still register the callback in the top_trans_start() => prepare_multiple_node_trans() => distribute_txn_assign_batchid()."
> Yes, only register the commit once it put it to the commit track list (tdtd_list), in original implementation, we might add it the list, but not register the callback. Not sure if this answers your question?

OK, the mention of top_trans_create() is some redundant and mis-guided.

parents.subject: LU-7199 nodemap: assign nodemap to export before connecting

commit.subject: LU-7400 lod: register stop callbacks at create
commit.message:
LU-7400 lod: register stop callbacks at create

In some cases we stop just created transaction (i.e. it's
empty, not started), but then top_trans_stop() waits
indefinitely for stop callbacks which were supposed to be
register at top_trans_start(). instead register them at
top_trans_create().

Instead of register the commit callback in top_trans_start(),
we should register the commit callback once the top thandle
is added into commit list, because in some error cases,
top_trans_start() might not be called, then the top thandle
will stay in the commit list forever, and also blocking
llog cancellation.

Change-Id: I1ca528e2f8f5e4d9cf6b5dd484653a055e17cc6c
Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <alexey.zhuravlev@intel.com>
Signed-off-by: wang di <di.wang@intel.com>
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/17059
Reviewed-by: Fan Yong <fan.yong@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: James Simmons <uja.ornl@yahoo.com>
Tested-by: Jenkins
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <oleg.drokin@intel.com>
